menu_promo_body: Open the schedule and inspect client details.
login_offlineHint: Sign-in needs the internet for the first device.
oauth_subtitle: One moment while we verify the sign-in.
join_subtitle: Use your recovery secret to add this device.
join_error_invalid: That recovery secret was not accepted.
pin_subtitle: Used when biometrics are not available.
pin_error_tooShort: PIN must be at least 6 digits.
rs_subtitle: Write it down. It is the only way back if you lose every device.
rs_confirm_intro: Tap the words in the order shown.
deviceLimit_subtitle: Sign out from another device to continue here.
offline_body: Tricho works without the internet. Open the schedule, browse clients, and capture photos — everything will sync when the connection is back.
camera_permissionMessage: Camera access is required to capture photos.
offline_pageBody: Tricho works without the internet. Open the schedule, browse clients, capture photos — sync will resume when the connection is back.
login_create_description: First, save your Recovery Secret. This is the only way to recover your data if you lose access to your passkey.
login_register_description: Now let's set up your passkey. This will be your primary way to unlock your vault.
login_register_passkeyInfo: Your passkey uses biometrics or device PIN for secure, passwordless access.
login_unlock_description: Use your passkey to unlock your vault.
login_recovery_description: Enter your Recovery Secret to unlock your vault.
login_recovery_invalidFormat: Invalid Recovery Secret format. Please check and try again.
login_recovery_failed: Failed to unlock with Recovery Secret
login_footer_text: Your data is encrypted and stored locally.
login_error_missingHandlers: Missing required handlers for vault creation
oauth_appDescription: Your private salon CRM. Encrypted on your device.
oauth_unlockWithRsLink: Already set up on this device? Unlock with Recovery Secret
oauth_footer: Sign-in is used only for sync and device management. Your data is encrypted on this device before it leaves.
join_restoreDescription: We found an existing vault for this account. Enter your Recovery Secret to unlock it on this device.
join_failed: Failed to unlock vault with that Recovery Secret.
join_footer: Your Recovery Secret stays on this device. The server only ever sees encrypted data.
pin_setupDescription: This device does not support biometric key derivation, so we'll use a PIN as the daily unlock. The PIN stays on this device — the server never sees it.
pin_unlockDescription: Enter your PIN to unlock the vault on this device.
rs_successMessage: Your Recovery Secret has been verified. Keep it safe — you'll need it to recover your vault if you lose access to your passkey.
rs_qrHint: Scan this QR code to import your Recovery Secret on another device
rs_formHint: Enter the last {length} characters of your Recovery Secret to verify you have saved it correctly.
rs_checksumMismatch: Checksum does not match. Please check your Recovery Secret and try again.
rs_confirmFailed: Failed to confirm Recovery Secret. Please try again.
rs_unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
rs_retryHint: Tip: The checksum is the last {length} characters shown above in the Recovery Secret.
rs_securityText: Never share your Recovery Secret with anyone. Tricho staff will never ask for it.
rs_setupSubtitle: This is your backup key. Write it down and store it securely. You will need it to recover your vault if you lose access to your passkey.
settings_syncDescription: Turn sync on to replicate your encrypted data to the server. The server only ever sees ciphertext.
settings_rsRotationDescription: Generates a new Recovery Secret, re-wraps your vault key with it, and replaces the old wrap. Your old RS stops working after this.
settings_signedInError: Not signed in to the sync server.
deviceLimit_descriptionWith: Your {tier} plan allows {limit} devices. Revoke one of your existing devices to add this one, or upgrade.
deviceLimit_descriptionWithout: Your plan does not allow more devices. Revoke one of your existing devices to add this one, or upgrade.
deviceLimit_noOtherDevices: No other devices found. Try again.
deviceLimit_sessionExpired_full: Session expired. Please sign in again.
appShell_deviceLimitHint: You have reached the device limit on your plan ({limit}). Revoke an existing device to add this one.
appShell_deviceLimitFallback: Revoke an existing device to add this one.
appShell_deviceLimitInstructions: Open Tricho on one of your existing devices, open Settings → Devices, and revoke the one you no longer use. Then come back here and sign in again.
plan_freeBlurb: Use Tricho on this single device. Your data stays here.
plan_renewalRequiredBody: Renew to resume cross-device sync and backups.
plan_inGraceBody: Sync continues until {date}. Renew to keep using Tricho across devices.
plan_pickerBankSubtitle: One payment, one period. No auto-renewal.
billing_payInstructions: Send the amount with the variable symbol below — usually arrives within a few hours.
billing_orScanQr: Or scan the QR with your bank app
plan_localBackup_blurb: Pick a calendar month — Tricho packages everything into a single ZIP you can save to your computer.
plan_localBackup_empty: No data for this month yet.
plan_localBackup_done: Backup ready — saved to your downloads folder.
restore_zip_blurb: Select your saved {filename} files. We'll merge them into this device's vault — your existing local data wins on conflict.
restore_zip_recoverySecret_help: Required to unlock the backup contents on this device.
restore_zip_error_invalid: That file is not a Tricho backup.
restore_zip_error_vault: This backup is for a different vault.
restore_zip_error_version: Backup format is too new for this app — please update.
